title: Localize core kit (organizer playbook + 2+ checklists) into 2+ non-English languages, safety-accuracy reviewed
context: To reach non-English-speaking communities, the core kit must be localized. Translations of medium and high-risk content are safety-accuracy reviewed (not only fluency-checked), because a mistranslated 'when to stop' criterion or a misrendered safety warning could cause harm. Translations of high-risk (electrical) content must be re-confirmed against the SME-approved source meaning. Source-license and attribution rules apply to translations as derivatives: the same reusePermitted constraints hold. Content license for translated output: CC-BY-4.0. The specific target languages should be partner-driven (research-017); until a partner is named, two commonly requested languages for community repair contexts are used as defaults.
objective: Produce safety-accuracy-reviewed translations of the organizer playbook and at least 2 triage checklists into at least 2 non-English languages, conforming to the data-002 schema, with the i18n-014 framework, and passing the CI catalog-completeness check.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 2 non-English language translations are delivered for: the organizer playbook and at least 2 triage checklists (minimum 6 translation units total)

Each translation is safety-accuracy reviewed — not only fluency-checked — by a competent speaker; a review-log entry records the translator and the safety-accuracy reviewer (distinct persons) for each unit

Source-license and attribution rules are respected in translated content: translated text is derivative of CC-BY-4.0 source only; sourceLicense and reusePermitted are carried through to the translated units

If any translated unit covers medium or high riskClass content, the translation has been confirmed for safety-accuracy against the approved English source; high-risk electrical translations are re-confirmed against the SME-approved source meaning
The CI catalog-completeness check passes for all delivered locales (no missing translation keys vs. the English source)
All translated units render correctly in the i18n-014 framework (including RTL if applicable), are published under CC-BY-4.0, and pass the CI content-governance gate
output: Committed translations of the organizer playbook and at least 2 checklists into at least 2 non-English languages (CC-BY-4.0), each safety-accuracy reviewed by a qualified speaker distinct from the translator, with PR-tied review-log entries.
